apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Manage your exchange API keys for trading.
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys have been added yet.

addModal.title: Add New API Key
addModal.desc: Enter the details for the new API key. Secrets are stored encrypted.
addModal.exchangeDesc: Internal identifier for the exchange or sub-account.

apiKeys.deleteModalDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

securityNotice.title: Security Notice
securityNotice.description: Never share your API keys with anyone. Ensure that withdrawal permissions are disabled for your keys. By using API keys, you accept all risks outlined in our

apiKeys.accountDeactivatedMessage: This account is deactivated. Enable to start trading.

dataSources.title: Data Collection
dataSources.description: Manage which symbols are actively monitored for market data.
dataSources.deleteSymbolDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {{symbol}} from monitored symbols? The bot will stop collecting market data for it.

risk.title: Global Risk Parameters
risk.description: These settings act as a master safeguard for your entire account.
risk.maxConsecutiveLossesDesc: Stop trading if the number of consecutive losing trades is reached.
risk.dailyMaxLossPercentDesc: Stop trading if the daily loss reaches this percentage of the balance.

live.title: Live Trading Risk Management
live.description: Settings for live trading risk management.

risk.defaultSlDesc: Default stop loss percentage if not set by strategy.
risk.maxStopDistancePctDesc: Maximum allowed distance for a stop loss from the entry price, as a percentage. Trades with a wider stop loss will be rejected.
risk.infoPanelDesc: These global limits are the final check. A strategy can be more conservative, but never more aggressive.
risk.riskPerTradeDesc: Percentage of the total balance to risk on a single trade.
risk.leverageDesc: The leverage to use for backtesting.

adaptive.title: Adaptive Risk Manager (Symbol-Strategy)
adaptive.description: Automatically adjusts risk for each trading pair based on its recent performance to limit losses from underperforming strategies.
adaptive.windowSizeDesc: The number of recent trades used to calculate PnL and WinRate.
adaptive.minTradesDesc: How many total trades a strategy must make on a symbol before the system starts applying rules.
adaptive.pnlThresholdDesc: If the sum of PnL in the window, divided by the sum of risk, drops below this value (e.g., -150%), risk will be reduced.
adaptive.winRateThresholdDesc: If the win rate in the analysis window falls below this value, risk will be reduced.
adaptive.maxConsecLossesDesc: If the strategy on a symbol gets this many losing trades in a row, risk will be immediately reduced.
adaptive.recoveryWinsDesc: How many profitable trades in a row the strategy must achieve to increase the risk level.
adaptive.recoveryPnlDesc: If the PnL in the analysis window exceeds this value (e.g., 50%), risk may be increased.
adaptive.cooldownDesc: How many seconds must pass after a risk reduction before the system can increase it again, even with good performance.

blacklist.title: Coin Blacklist
blacklist.description: Coins in this list will not be traded by the bot. Changes apply immediately.

autoRules.title: Automatic Rules
autoRules.description: Automatically add coins to blacklist when conditions are met

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Configure how you receive alerts and updates.
notifications.telegramBotLinkDesc: Click the button above to automatically link your Telegram account to DepthSight via our bot.
notifications.telegramActiveDesc: Notifications are actively being sent to your Telegram.
notifications.telegramBindingStartedDesc: Open Telegram and press 'Start' to complete the binding process.
notifications.notificationTypesDesc: Choose which events trigger Telegram notifications.
